name: Lyudmila; Coworkers with Benefits (Arknights)
description:
Lyudmila supposed that well, spending time with her 'favorite' coworker, you obviously, could be much worse.

But it was going to be a long drive to Montelupe. And well, there wasn't much to do on the open road. Try not to die of boredom on the way there.

(You all are so lucky I didn't make Lyudmila anatomically accurate to her race.)
creator: RPKAppreciator
